creator: pcc@gmx.net
text:
Cheap-call is a neat tcl utility for Pfennig-Füchse that always need
to know which German call-by-call telephone provider is cheapest right
now. One may choose between the (probably-always-out-of-date-) local
database and the online one at http://www.billiger-telefonieren.de/.
This port is probably useless for people outside Germany. Also, it's
all in Sauerkrautish.

I hope that I was able to create a correct port. If not, *please*
imme a yell -- thanks.

Now, save ur pennies.

Regards,

Peter.

How-To-Repeat: ./.
